event.target_scope: /_houra/client/** Product MVP behavior, Product MVP UI surface adoption, and implementation adoption evidence
event.matrix_roadmap_boundary: imoyan/houra-spec#95 remains separate and does not block the Product MVP release candidate unless the release claims Matrix compatibility.

required_repositories.role: canonical contracts, vectors, design inputs, UI surface, and release-candidate plan
required_repositories.required_ref: the release-candidate spec commit or tag

required_repositories.role: PostgreSQL-backed server behavior and Docker Compose deploy smoke evidence
required_repositories.required_ref: the server commit, tag, or release consumed by the release candidate

required_repositories.role: Expo React Native app layer, Product MVP happy path evidence, and UI surface adoption evidence
required_repositories.required_ref: the client commit, tag, or release consumed by the release candidate

required_inputs: secret and local path redaction result
changed contracts, vectors, or design inputs

required_evidence_before_advertisement: server capability advertisement evidence
client UI hidden or disabled state when unsupported
client recoverable error display evidence
duplicate-submit prevention evidence
token and callback redaction evidence
media metadata capability evidence
client thumbnail range and resume UI gating evidence
progress retry and recoverable error evidence
duplicate-submit prevention evidence
signed URL local path and media key redaction evidence
encrypted attachment capability evidence
client missing-key wrong-key redacted and recoverable-error evidence
crypto-adapter handoff evidence
duplicate-submit prevention evidence
media key room key recovery key plaintext byte and decrypted thumbnail redaction evidence
WebRTC low-latency capability advertisement evidence
runtime-specific selected candidate-pair RTT and bitrate evidence
topology center-selection fairness and fallback evidence
same-LAN opt-in and relay fallback evidence when same-LAN fastest is used
private IP SDP ICE credential TURN credential and provider log redaction evidence
implementation adoption report with exact server ref
representative vector command results
redacted evidence artifact check
Product MVP claim boundary and excluded UI sample and Matrix claims

required_commands: implementation repo Product MVP happy path command recorded by imoyan/houra-client#121
implementation repo UI surface adoption command recorded by imoyan/houra-client#122
implementation repo Docker Compose deploy smoke command recorded by imoyan/houra-server#227
redaction_policy: Do not record raw bearer tokens, refresh tokens, database URLs, image registry credentials, private local paths, or machine-specific environment values.
Do not record private IP addresses, mDNS hostnames, SDP bodies, raw ICE candidates, ICE credentials, TURN credentials, MAC addresses, local interface names, or provider logs.
Record only redacted environment shape and reproducible command names.
event.rc_tag_policy: Do not cut a Product MVP release-candidate tag until all blocking evidence lanes name refs, commands, results, blockers, and claim boundaries.
